headlines.description: — Sam Antonacci hit a two-run home run, Braden Montgomery matched his career-high with four RBI, and the Chicago White Sox extended their winning streak to four with a 12-4 win over the Toronto Blue Jays on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sam Antonacci hits two-run HR, Braden Montgomery drives in four as White Sox beat Blue Jays 12-4

headlines.description: — Chris Sale pitched seven shutout innings of two-hit ball and Drake Baldwin, Matt Olson and Austin Riley homered for Atlanta during a 19-hit outburst as the Braves pounded the Texas Rangers 15-1 on Friday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chris Sale dominates with 7 shutout innings as the Braves rout the Rangers 15-1

headlines.description: — Garrett Mitchell’s two-out single up the middle in the 10th inning scored automatic runner Jackson Chourio from second, and the Milwaukee Brewers beat the Miami Marlins 2-1 on Friday night to snap a three-game skid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Garrett Mitchell's walk-off single in 10th lifts Brewers to 2-1 win over Marlins

headlines.description: — Willy Adames hit his seventh career grand slam, Bryce Eldridge smacked a two-run homer and Landen Roupp threw seven sharp innings as the San Francisco Giants beat the Seattle Mariners 7-0 on Friday night in their first game after the All-Star break.
headlines.shortLinkText: Adames hits 7th career grand slam and Roupp goes 7 innings as Giants blank Mariners 7-0
